DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF HENRY LANDSMAN'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF ACTION BY CMB FOR BASIS STATUE OF LIMITATIONS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 7, 2013 TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 AM ON THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR. PETITIONER SHALL COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4:00PM ON MAY 15 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE OR THE MOTION MAY BE DENIED. ANY PARTY WHO CONTESTS A TENTATIVE RULING MUST SEND AN EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG WITH A COPY TO ALL OTHER PARTIES BY 4PM STATING, WITHOUT ARGUMENT, THE PORTION(S) OF THE TENTATIVE RULING THAT THE PARTY CONTESTS. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

LAW AND MOTION 302, LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER HENRY LANDSMAN'S MOTION TO GRANT WRIT FOR NO OPPOSING EXPERT IS DENIED. PETITIONER FAILED TO MAKE AVAILABLE AN ADEQUATE RECORD OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEEDING OR TO GRANT ANY OF THE RELIEF THAT PETITIONER SEEKS. THE PETITIONER INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE HAD NOT SET A HEARING FOR THE WRIT OF MANDATE. THE WRIT OF MANDATE IS SET FOR HEARING ON JULY 15, 2013 AT 9:30 A.M IN DEPT. 302. REPLY BRIEF TO BE FILED BY JULY 3, 2013. COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PAPERS FILED TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Motion To Grant Writ For No Opposing Expert
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: HENRY LANDSMAN, MD FACEP, PETITIONER IN PRO PER.
JANE ZACK SIMON, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, 415.703.5544, FOR RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIES PETITIONER HENRY LANDSMAN'S Motion To Grant Writ For No Opposing Expert. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Motion To Grant Writ For No Opposing Expert
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - HENRY LANDSMAN. TEL. NO. (707) 497-0424, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. JANE ZACK SIMON, TEL. NO. 703-5544 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER HENRY LANDSMAN's Motion To Grant Writ For No Opposing Expert IS DENIED. PETITIONER FAILED TO MAKE AVAILABLE AN ADEQUATE RECORD OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEEDING OR TO GRANT ANY OF THE RELIEF THAT PETITIONER SEEKS. THE PETITIONER INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE HAD NOT SET A HEARING FOR THE WRIT OF MANDATE. THE WRIT OF MANDATE IS SET FOR HEARING ON JULY 15, 2013 AT 9:30 A.M IN DEPT. 302. REPLY BRIEF TO BE FILED BY JULY 3, 2013. COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PAPERS FILED TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302. Judge: Marla J. Off Calendar May-13-2013 Continued To Jun-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Petitioner HENRY LANDSMAN'S Motion to Compel Discovery is continued to June 7, 2013. Petitioner shall comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the motion to Department 302 no later than 4:00pm on May 15 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date or the motion may be denied. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests.
